# Fixture for elot-gptel lint tests.
# Top-level ontology heading without prefix table -- should trigger
# the elot/prefix-table checker.

#+title: Broken Ontology
#+author: ELOT test suite

* broken
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       broken
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: broken
:header-args:omn: :tangle ./broken.omn :noweb yes
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:END:

** broken ontology (http://example.org/ex/broken)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       broken-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
